title: taraxacum cherwellense
intro: Taraxacum cherwellense, also known as Cherwell dandelion or Oxford dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb native to England and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels and improving liver function. Taraxacum cherwellense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
